query:
SELECT s.id, s.externalId, s.planName, s.monthlyCost, s.customerExternalId, c.name as customerName
FROM services s
LEFT JOIN customers c ON s.customerExternalId = c.externalId
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND c.name IN ('Albany Family Doctors', 'Aspley Firstcare Doctors', 'Ausdocs Carindale Pty Ltd', 'Kawana Family Clinic', 'Mount Cotton Medical Centre', 'Stafford Heights Medical Practice')
ORDER BY c.name, s.planName;
